spec.instructions: Understand existing code patterns via codegraph_explore. Define API boundary: what types, traits, function signatures. Do NOT code yet.

implement.instructions: Implement incrementally (~100 lines). Verify compiles after each chunk. Follow existing patterns in neighboring files.

verify.instructions: Run verification. If tests fail → IMPLEMENT. If compilation errors → IMPLEMENT.

review.instructions: Evaluator-optimizer: auto-crítica 3 ejes (correctitud, simplicidad, consistencia). Verificar edge cases, ponytail ladder aplicada, codegraph_explore post-implement para verificar blast radius. Máximo 2 iteraciones.

accept.instructions: RATCHETED DOD v${dod_version}. Leer dod_version del workflow. V1: contrato ✅, output validado ✅, blast radius verificado ✅, deuda técnica identificada ✅, documentación actualizada ✅. V2+: +ponytail-review sin findings, +test-coverage. V3+: +no secrets en diff, +conventional-commit validado. Si todas ✅ → ACCEPTED.

close.instructions: git add -p + git commit con Conventional Commits. skill progreso (Trigger 1). Context Save Point.
